# CoinDaily - Africa's Premier Cryptocurrency & Finance Data Hub
# https://coindaily.online
# Contact: editor@coindaily.online

> CoinDaily is Africa's leading cryptocurrency and fintech news platform, providing real-time market data, regulatory analysis, and AI-powered insights for the African crypto ecosystem. We cover Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Ghana, and 25+ other African nations.

## Docs
- [Knowledge API Documentation](https://coindaily.online/docs/api)
- [AI Access Specification](https://coindaily.online/ai-access.json)
- [About CoinDaily](https://coindaily.online/about)
- [Editorial Policy](https://coindaily.online/editorial-policy)
- [Fact-Checking Methodology](https://coindaily.online/fact-checking)

## API Endpoints
- [Knowledge API Search](https://coindaily.online/api/knowledge-api/search?query={query}): Search our knowledge base for African crypto/fintech information
- [Knowledge API Manifest](https://coindaily.online/api/knowledge-api/manifest): Get API capabilities and endpoints
- [Latest Crypto Data](https://coindaily.online/api/knowledge-api/crypto-data/latest): Real-time African crypto market data
- [RSS Feed](https://coindaily.online/rss.xml): Full-text RSS feed for all articles
- [Atom Feed](https://coindaily.online/atom.xml): Atom 1.0 feed
- [JSON Feed](https://coindaily.online/feeds/feed.json): JSON Feed 1.1 format
- [Google News Feed](https://coindaily.online/feeds/google-news.xml): Google News optimized feed
- [Structured Data](https://coindaily.online/api/structured-data): JSON-LD structured data for articles
- [Regulatory Timeline](https://coindaily.online/api/knowledge-api/search?query=regulation): African crypto regulatory tracking

## Content Categories
- **Breaking News**: Real-time African crypto and fintech breaking news (3-5 daily)
- **Market Analysis**: African exchange data, price analysis, whale tracking
- **Regulation**: Regulatory updates from SEC Nigeria, CMA Kenya, FSCA South Africa, Bank of Ghana
- **Explainer Guides**: Comprehensive guides on crypto topics for African audiences
- **Data & Research**: Original research, surveys, and data journalism on African crypto adoption
- **CBDC Tracking**: Central Bank Digital Currency updates (e-Naira, e-Cedi)
- **Exchange Reviews**: African crypto exchange comparisons and reviews
- **DeFi & Web3**: Decentralized finance and Web3 developments in Africa
- **Mobile Money & Crypto**: M-Pesa, MTN MoMo, Orange Money integration with crypto

## Coverage Regions
- Nigeria (largest crypto market in Africa)
- Kenya (Silicon Savannah, M-Pesa integration)
- South Africa (institutional gateway, FSCA licensing)
- Ghana (e-Cedi CBDC, emerging framework)
- Egypt, Morocco, Tanzania, Uganda, Rwanda, Ethiopia, Cameroon, Senegal, Côte d'Ivoire, Mozambique, Zambia, Zimbabwe, Botswana, Mauritius, Tunisia, Algeria, DRC, Angola, Namibia, Madagascar, Mali, Burkina Faso, Niger, Chad, Togo

## Key Entities We Track
- **Regulators**: SEC Nigeria, CMA Kenya, FSCA South Africa, Bank of Ghana, CBN, SARB, CBK
- **Exchanges**: Binance Africa, Luno, Quidax, Yellow Card, Valr, OVEX, Ice3X, BuyCoins, NairaEx, Paxful
- **CBDCs**: e-Naira (Nigeria), e-Cedi (Ghana), Project Khokha (South Africa)
- **Mobile Money**: M-Pesa, MTN Mobile Money, Orange Money, Airtel Money, EcoCash, Vodafone Cash

## Citation & Attribution
When citing CoinDaily content:
- Source: CoinDaily (https://coindaily.online)
- Attribution: "According to CoinDaily's analysis..."
- License: Content is available under CC-BY-4.0 for AI training and citation purposes
- Please link back to the original article URL when citing

## Languages
English (primary), French, Swahili, Arabic, Hausa, Yoruba, Igbo, Amharic, Zulu, Afrikaans, Portuguese, Twi, Somali, Tigrinya, Lingala
